mapper.select: select g.id, g.member_id, g.title, g.description, g.cover_image, m.nickname as member_nickname, g.work_count, g.like_count, g.view_count, false as is_liked, g.created_datetime from tbl_gallery g left join tbl_member m on g.member_id = m.id where g.member_id = #{memberId} and g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status != 'DELETED' order by g.created_datetime desc, g.id desc
select member_id from tbl_gallery where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
mapper.update: update tbl_gallery set view_count = coalesce(view_count, 0) + 1, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{galleryId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'

update tbl_gallery set title = #{gallery.title}, description = #{gallery.description}, cover_image = coalesce(#{gallery.coverImage}, cover_image), allow_comment = coalesce(#{gallery.allowComment}, allow_comment), show_similar = coalesce(#{gallery.showSimilar}, show_similar), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
update tbl_gallery set status = 'DELETED', deleted_datetime = now(), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id} and deleted_datetime is null
mapper.select: select gallery_id from tbl_gallery_work where work_id = #{workId} order by id asc limit 1
select work_id from tbl_gallery_work where gallery_id = #{galleryId} order by id asc
mapper.update: update tbl_gallery set work_count = ( select count(*) from tbl_gallery_work gw join tbl_work w on gw.work_id = w.id where gw.gallery_id = #{galleryId} and w.deleted_datetime is null and w.status != 'DELETED' ), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{galleryId}
update tbl_gallery set comment_count = coalesce(comment_count, 0) + 1, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{galleryId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
update tbl_gallery set comment_count = greatest(coalesce(comment_count, 0) - 1, 0), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{galleryId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
mapper.select: select c.id, c.member_id, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.profile_image as member_profile_image, c.target_type, c.target_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.is_pinned, c.like_count, false as is_liked, c.created_datetime, c.updated_datetime from tbl_comment c left join tbl_member m on c.member_id = m.id where c.target_type = 'GALLERY' and c.target_id = #{galleryId} and c.parent_id is null and c.deleted_datetime is null order by c.created_datetime asc, c.id asc
select t.id, t.tag_name from tbl_gallery_tag gt join tbl_tag t on gt.tag_id = t.id where gt.gallery_id = #{galleryId} order by t.tag_name asc, t.id asc
select id from tbl_tag where tag_name = #{tagName} limit 1

select g.id, g.member_id, m.nickname as member_nickname, m.profile_image as member_profile_image, g.title, g.description, g.cover_image, g.allow_comment, g.show_similar, g.work_count, g.like_count, g.comment_count, g.view_count, g.status, g.created_datetime from tbl_gallery g left join tbl_member m on g.member_id = m.id where g.id = #{id} and g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status != 'DELETED'

select g.id, g.member_id, g.title, g.description, g.cover_image, m.nickname as member_nickname, g.work_count, g.like_count, g.view_count, g.created_datetime from tbl_gallery g left join tbl_member m on g.member_id = m.id where g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status = 'EXHIBITING' order by g.view_count desc, g.like_count desc limit 8
mapper.update: update tbl_gallery set like_count = coalesce(like_count, 0) + 1, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{galleryId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
update tbl_gallery set like_count = greatest(coalesce(like_count, 0) - 1, 0), updated_datetime = now() where id = #{galleryId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'
mapper.select: select coalesce(like_count, 0) from tbl_gallery where id = #{galleryId} and deleted_datetime is null and status != 'DELETED'

select g.id, g.title, case when nullif(g.cover_image, '') is not null then true else false end as has_cover_image from tbl_gallery g where g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status = 'EXHIBITING' order by g.view_count desc, g.like_count desc limit 8
select g.cover_image, g.updated_datetime from tbl_gallery g where g.id = #{id} and g.deleted_datetime is null and g.status = 'EXHIBITING'
select t.id, t.tag_name from tbl_tag t join tbl_gallery_tag gt on gt.tag_id = t.id group by t.id, t.tag_name order by count(*) desc limit #{limit}
